basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Junior Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) has published the Junior Project Coordinator Notification 2026 on the official PGIMER website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Project Coordinator position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 28 years and holding a Bachelor’s degree in Science with experience in a Health care center, along with knowledge of computers and local language, are eligible to apply through email mode at the official website. The application process is open until 15-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and applica

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation will be provided for women, SC, ST, OBC, and PWD candidates as per government rules.

qualification.details: Junior Project Coordinator: Bachelor's in science from a recognized university. Must have experience in a Health care center and possess knowledge of computers and the local language.

salary_details.details: Junior Project Coordinator: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Junior Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Junior Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated recipient before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Science from a recognized university. Additionally, experience in a healthcare center is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Junior Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for this position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 22,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their submitted CV, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q6. What additional skills are required for this role?
faq.answer: Apart from the educational qualifications and experience, candidates must have knowledge of computers and the local language.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or project-based job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment, meaning the position is for a specific duration related to the research project.

faq.question: Q8. Where is PGIMER located?
faq.answer: PGIMER is located in Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-based restrictions, so candidates from other states are likely eligible, provided they meet all other criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
